memoryArtifacts.headline: Robert Ier de Bar
memoryArtifacts.description: Robert Ier de Bar, né le 8 novembre 1344, mort le 12 avril 1411, fut marquis de Pont-à-Mousson et comte de Bar de 1352 à 1354, puis duc de Bar de 1354 à 1411. Il était le fils cadet d'Henri IV, comte …

popularStory.headline: Robert Ier de Bar
popularStory.description: Robert Ier de Bar, né le 8 novembre 1344, mort le 12 avril 1411, fut marquis de Pont-à-Mousson et comte de Bar de 1352 à 1354, puis duc de Bar de 1354 à 1411. Il était le fils cadet d'Henri IV, comte …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Bar I Comte puis Duc de Bar於1344年11月8日出生時，他的父親Henri de Bar IV, Count of Bar27歲，母親Yolande de Dampierre20歲。他於大約1359年與Marie de Burgundy Capet, Duchess Consort of Bar在法國洛萊姆斯巴勒迪克結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1411年4月12日享年66歲，埋葬在法國洛萊姆斯巴勒迪克。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert de Bar I Comte puis Duc de Bar于1344年11月8日出生时，他的父亲Henri de Bar IV, Count of Bar27岁，母亲Yolande de Dampierre20岁。他于大约1359年与Marie de Burgundy Capet, Duchess Consort of Bar在法国洛萊姆斯巴勒迪克结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1411年4月12日享年66岁，埋葬在法国洛萊姆斯巴勒迪克。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bar
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Moshe, Giora, Ilan, Arie, Eliahu, Hadassa, Haim, Menashe, Mordechai, Nadav, Nir, Noam.  French Dany, Francois, Henri.  German Hans, Gerhard, Willi.
Jewish (Ashkenazic; also Bär): from the Yiddish male personal name Ber (see Baer 2).
German (Bär): variant of Baer 1 ‘bear’ and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this and of its cognate Bähr (see Bahr 2).

variants.name: Baer
meanings: German (also Bär): from Middle High German ber ‘bear’, a nickname for someone thought to resemble the animal in some way, a metonymic occupational name for someone who kept a performing bear, or a topographic or habitational name referring to a house distinguished by the sign of a bear. In some cases it may derive from a personal name containing this element. Compare Bar 2.
Jewish (Ashkenazic; also Bär): from the Yiddish male personal name Ber, from Yiddish ber ‘bear’. Compare Bar 1.
Germanized form (also Bär) of Sorbian Běr: see Bar 3.

variants.name: Dubar
meanings: French (mainly Nord): habitational name, with fused preposition and definite article du ‘from the’, denoting someone from any of several places called Bar (see Bar ).

variants.name: Debar
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Laurent, Pierre.
French: habitational name, with fused preposition de ‘from’, denoting someone from any of several places called Bar (see Bar ).

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Bar I Comte puis Duc de Bar was born on 8 November 1344, his father, Henri de Bar IV, Count of Bar, was 27 and his mother, Yolande de Dampierre, was 20. He married Marie de Burgundy Capet, Duchess Consort of Bar about 1359, in Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, France. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 12 April 1411, at the age of 66, and was buried in Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert de Bar I Comte puis Duc de Bar est né le 8 novembre 1344, son père, Henri de Bar IV, Count of Bar, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Yolande de Dampierre, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Marie de Burgundy Capet, Duchess Consort of Bar environ 1359, à Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, France. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 12 avril 1411, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterré à Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert de Bar I Comte puis Duc de Bar am 8. November 1344 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henri de Bar IV, Count of Bar 27 und seine Mutter Yolande de Dampierre 20. Er hat um 1359 in Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lothringen, Frankreich Marie de Burgundy Capet, Duchess Consort of Bar geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 12. April 1411 im Alter von 66 Jahren und wurde in Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lothringen, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Bar I Comte puis Duc de Bar è nato il il 8 novembre 1344, il suo padre, Henri de Bar IV, Count of Bar, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Yolande de Dampierre, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Marie de Burgundy Capet, Duchess Consort of Bar circa 1359, nel Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 12 aprile 1411, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolto a Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert de Bar I Comte puis Duc de Barが1344年11月8日に生まれた時，父Henri de Bar IV, Count of Barは27歳，母Yolande de Dampierreは20歳であった。約1359年にフランスロレィヌメウゼバー-レ-ドウックでMarie de Burgundy Capet, Duchess Consort of Barと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1411年4月12日に66歳で死去し，フランスロレィヌメウゼバー-レ-ドウックにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Bar I Comte puis Duc de Bar(이)가 1344년 11월 8일에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henri de Bar IV, Count of Bar(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Yolande de Dampierre(은)는 20세였다. 그는 대략 1359년 프랑스 로레이인 우스 바-레-드크에서 Marie de Burgundy Capet, Duchess Consort of Bar(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1411년 4월 12일 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 로레이인 우스 바-레-드크에 묻혔다.

mn.8 November 1344–12 April 1411: 1344 оны Арваннэгдүгээр сарын 8–1411 оны Дөрөвдүгээр сарын 12

pt.8 November 1344–12 April 1411: 8 de novembro de 1344–12 de abril de 1411
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Bar I Comte puis Duc de Bar nasceu em 8 de novembro de 1344, seu pai, Henri de Bar IV, Count of Bar, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Yolande de Dampierre, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Marie de Burgundy Capet, Duchess Consort of Bar aproximadamente 1359, em Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 12 de abril de 1411, com 66 anos, e foi sepultado em Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Bar I Comte puis Duc de Bar родился 8 ноября 1344 г., его отцу по имени Henri de Bar IV, Count of Bar было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Yolande de Dampierre, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Marie de Burgundy Capet, Duchess Consort of Bar около 1359 г. в местности бар-ле-дук, меус, лорреаин, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер 12 апреля 1411 г. в возрасте 66 лет и был похоронен в местности бар-ле-дук, меус, лорреаин, Франция.

sm.1352-1354: mai le 1352 e o'o I le 1354
sm.1354-1411: mai le 1354 e o'o I le 1411

es.8 November 1344–12 April 1411: 8 de noviembre de 1344–12 de abril de 1411
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert de Bar I Comte puis Duc de Bar nació el 8 de noviembre de 1344, su papá, Henri de Bar IV, Count of Bar, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Yolande de Dampierre, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Marie de Burgundy Capet, Duchess Consort of Bar aproximadamente 1359, en Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 12 de abril de 1411, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultado en Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, Francia.
